allow: Bash(node -e "import\('dotenv'\).then\(d=>{d.config\(\);const m=require\('mongoose'\);m.connect\(process.env.MONGODB_URI\).then\(async\(\)=>{console.log\('CONNECTED OK → db:', m.connection.name\);await m.connection.close\(\);process.exit\(0\)}\).catch\(e=>{console.error\('CONNECT FAILED:', e.message\);process.exit\(1\)}\)}\)")

Bash(curl -s -X POST http://localhost:4000/leads -H "Content-Type: application/json" -d '{"name":"Test User","email":"test@example.com","phone":"9999999999","program":"generalist","source":"connection-test","message":"Atlas test lead"}')

Bash(node -e "import\('dotenv'\).then\(async d=>{d.config\(\);const m=require\('mongoose'\);await m.connect\(process.env.MONGODB_URI\);const db=m.connection.db;console.log\('Connected DB name:',m.connection.name\);const cols=await db.listCollections\(\).toArray\(\);console.log\('Collections:',cols.map\(c=>c.name\)\);for\(const c of cols\){const n=await db.collection\(c.name\).countDocuments\(\);console.log\('  ',c.name,'→',n,'docs'\)}const leads=await db.collection\('leads'\).find\({}\).limit\(5\).toArray\(\).catch\(\(\)=>[]\);console.log\('Sample leads:',leads.map\(l=>\({email:l.email,source:l.source,createdAt:l.createdAt}\)\)\);await m.connection.close\(\)}\)")

Bash(node -e "const m=require\('mongoose'\);m.connect\('mongodb://127.0.0.1:27017/meridian',{serverSelectionTimeoutMS:2500}\).then\(async\(\)=>{const n=await m.connection.db.collection\('leads'\).countDocuments\(\);console.log\('LOCAL meridian.leads count:',n\);await m.connection.close\(\)}\).catch\(e=>console.log\('No local mongod / not reachable:',e.message\)\)")

Bash(node -e "import\('dotenv'\).then\(async d=>{d.config\(\);const m=require\('mongoose'\);await m.connect\(process.env.MONGODB_URI\);const db=m.connection.db;console.log\('DB:',m.connection.name\);const n=await db.collection\('leads'\).countDocuments\(\);console.log\('Atlas leads count:',n\);const recent=await db.collection\('leads'\).find\({}\).sort\({createdAt:-1}\).limit\(5\).toArray\(\);recent.forEach\(l=>console.log\('  -',l.email||l.name||'\(no email\)','| source:',l.source,'|',l.createdAt\)\);await m.connection.close\(\)}\)")

Bash(node -e "import\('dotenv'\).then\(async d=>{d.config\(\);const m=require\('mongoose'\);await m.connect\(process.env.MONGODB_URI\);const n=await m.connection.db.collection\('leads'\).countDocuments\(\);const last=await m.connection.db.collection\('leads'\).find\({}\).sort\({createdAt:-1}\).limit\(1\).toArray\(\);console.log\('  Atlas menler.leads count:',n,'| newest:',last[0]?.email\);await m.connection.close\(\)}\)")

PowerShell(Stop-Process -Id 27408 -Force; Start-Sleep -Milliseconds 500; $still = Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 4000 -State Listen -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if \($still\) { Write-Output "Port 4000 still in use by PID $\($still.OwningProcess\)" } else { Write-Output "Port 4000 is now FREE" })

Bash(node -e "import\('dotenv'\).then\(async d=>{d.config\(\);const m=require\('mongoose'\);await m.connect\(process.env.MONGODB_URI\);const n=await m.connection.db.collection\('leads'\).countDocuments\(\);const last=await m.connection.db.collection\('leads'\).find\({}\).sort\({createdAt:-1}\).limit\(1\).toArray\(\);console.log\('  Atlas count:',n,'| newest:',last[0]?.email,'| source:',last[0]?.source\);await m.connection.close\(\)}\)")

Bash(node -e 'import\('\\''dotenv'\\''\).then\(async d=>{d.config\(\);const m=require\('\\''mongoose'\\''\);await m.connect\(process.env.MONGODB_URI\);const r=await m.connection.db.collection\('\\''leads'\\''\).deleteMany\({source:{$in:['\\''atlas-final-check'\\'','\\''atlas-verify'\\'','\\''connection-test'\\'']}}\);console.log\('\\''  deleted'\\'',r.deletedCount,'\\''test lead\(s\)'\\''\);const n=await m.connection.db.collection\('\\''leads'\\''\).countDocuments\(\);console.log\('\\''  Atlas leads now:'\\'',n\);await m.connection.close\(\)}\)')

PowerShell($p = Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 4000 -State Listen -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if \($p\) { Stop-Process -Id $p.OwningProcess -Force; Write-Output "Stopped background server \(PID $\($p.OwningProcess\)\). Port 4000 is free for you." } else { Write-Output "No server on port 4000." })
